title: B63 3PN, Midland Oil Refinery limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/GP3135SD/V008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:   Operator name: Midlands Oil Refinery Limited Installation name: Midlands Oil Refinery Permit number: EPR/GP3135SD/V008  "
